channel.title: Financial Planning on Sakthi Priyan H
channel.description: Recent content in Financial Planning on Sakthi Priyan H

item.title: ₹1 Crore Home Loan — The Reality (Nominal vs Real Cost)
item.description: What a ₹1 Crore home loan at 8% truly costs in nominal vs real terms across 10, 15, and 20 year tenures.

item.title: ₹1 Crore Home Loan — The Reality
item.description: What a ₹1 Crore home loan at 8% truly costs — the gap between nominal fear and real burden across 10, 15, and 20 year tenures.

item.title: ₹1 Crore in 10 Years — The Real Math (With Inflation, Taxes & Growth Plan)
item.description: Most SIP calculators lie to you. Here’s the real math behind ₹1 Crore in 10 years — accounting for inflation, exit tax, and a growing SIP.

item.title: ₹1 Crore in 10 Years — The Real Math
item.description: Why your ₹1 Crore target might need ₹1.79 Crores — inflation, tax, and the truth about wealth planning.

item.title: RealValue EMI Engine Use Cases
item.description: Discover real-world scenarios showing how to use the RealValue EMI Engine for home loans, car loans, personal loans, and understanding the true cost of debt with inflation-adjusted calculations.

item.title: Debt Is a Tool, Not an Enemy | Smart Loans vs Bad Loans Explained
item.description: Understanding the difference between smart loans and bad loans. Learn when debt can be a powerful tool for wealth creation and when it becomes a burden.

item.title: Why Debt Is a Tool — Not an Enemy
item.description: Understanding when and how to use debt strategically for building wealth.

item.title: RealValue SIP Engine | Investment Planning Tool for India
item.description: Complete walkthrough of the RealValue SIP Engine — a powerful investment planning tool that shows real (inflation-adjusted) returns, handles multiple goal types, and provides comprehensive financial projections.

item.title: RealValue SIP Engine Use Cases
item.description: Discover real-world scenarios showing how to use the RealValue SIP Engine for retirement planning, education goals, house down payments, emergency funds, and more.

item.title: Introduction to Building Wealth
item.description:
Welcome to Your Wealth-Building Journey

Building wealth doesn’t have to be complicated, risky, or exciting. In fact, the most successful wealth-building strategies are often the most boring ones. This book will guide you through time-tested, proven methods that have helped millions of people achieve financial independence.

What Makes This Approach “Boring”?

When we say “boring,” we mean:

  • Predictable: No get-rich-quick schemes or market timing
  • Consistent: Regular, disciplined actions over time
  • Simple: Easy to understand and implement
  • Proven: Backed by decades of research and real-world results

What You’ll Learn

Throughout this book, you’ll discover:
